title: Canvas Theme Renderer Fix
notes: Canvas background selections now visibly change the actual Drill Log and Shot Diagram canvas areas.
The renderer no longer paints the old opaque gray background over the selected theme.
All twelve custom themes and the Original Gray reset remain available under Settings.
The selected theme still applies immediately and remains saved on the device.
No saved-hole data, export formats, calculations, calibration settings, or backup formats were changed.
